description: Create a GeoPackage vector layer to track sensor deployments. Save the database to /home/ga/GIS_Data/sensor_network.gpkg with the table name 'sensors', using Point geometry and EPSG:4326 - WGS 84. Include two fields: 'model_id' (Text) and 'install_year' (Integer). Add a point feature in the San Francisco area with the attributes model_id 'EnvSense-X1' and install_year 2024, ensuring all edits are saved to the file.
